nasb.text: But now, please listen, O my lord the king; please let my petition come before you and do not make me return to the house of Jonathan the scribe, that I may not die there.”

esv.text: Now hear, please, O my lord the king: let my humble plea come before you and do not send me back to the house of Jonathan the secretary, lest I die there.”

cnv.text: 我主我王啊！現在求你垂聽，求你容我向你懇求！不要把我送回書記約拿單的房子去，免得我死在那裡。”

ccb.text: 现在，我主我王啊，请听我说！求你不要把我送回书记约拿单的房子，免得我死在那里。”
